feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Applications Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Applications Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Looking for advanced training material and/or classes
entry.content: We're looking for advanced training material and or classes for using SAP Cloud Application Studio to enhance our instance of SAP Business ByDesign. For instance, there's only one tutorial series under learning.sap.com that touches on the UI Designer and it's very basic.

entry.title: How to update data in custom facet with the use of data workbench C4C?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good Morning!!!

I have created a custom facet called "PO Details" in Opportunity BO. In that facet there are 4 columns where  end users need to fill PO details manually. Now they have 100 or more than 100 Opportunities where they need to fill the data in custom facet, so they want these data will be filled automatically by uploading excel sheet in PO details facet.

Is it possible, if we can upload excel sheet in custom facet with the updated data in sheet and based on that data, details updated in dedicated columns. Can we do this with the help of data workbench in c4c? If yes, then please guide with the steps.

Thank you!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: How to configure attachment type for custom BO in C4C?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I want to configure attachment type dropdown list for custom BO, developed in SDK.

As in the pre delivered usage type Standard BOs are there so i can use newly created attachment type in standard BO but how i can use in custom BO?

Default attachment types are coming in custom BO. 

 

How to achive this using SDK ?

C4C Extensibility SAP Cloud Applications Studio C4C Sales C4C Service

entry.title: Empty content in RESTCallResult for GET when using ExecuteRESTService
entry.content:
We have used several times WebServiceUtilities.ExecuteRESTService() and WebServiceUtilities.ExecuteRESTServiceWithoutEncoding(). So far the RequestMethod had always been "POST" and everything worked fine. The body of the Response was always included in the returned RESTCallResult.content structure.

Now I want to add another call with one of the above methods in an absl script, but now the result is not returning any content in the absl file.

When calling the REST Service in Postman, everything works fine and I am sure that the webservice is returning the xml structure.

What I am missing here? What would be the correct way to get xml content from a GET REST Webservice if this is not the correct script method?

entry.title: Not Yet Published Object
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

We are currently working on a development project and encountering the following error when attempting to download or check our patch solution in the SDK.

It seems that there is an issue in the UI Designer.

We are unsure how to publish the object listed below. Could you kindly guide us on how to resolve this issue as soon as possible?

-----------------------------

Not yet published object: /YEGXXXXXX_MAIN/CHANGE_TRANSACTIONS/Partner/ChangeFieldVisibility/73fXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXda.uichange Not yet published 

----------------------------

BR
Chen

entry.title: Generate PDF Form binary with script in SDK
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

In SAP Cloud Applications Studio, I am trying to generate a pdf form with this function:

var formTemplateCode : OutputRequestFormTemplateCode;
formTemplateCode.content = "ME_08";
var formTemplateLanguage = "E";
var binary :BinaryObject;

binary = OutputManagementUtilities.GetPDF(this, formTemplateCode, formTemplateLanguage);

The code is in the Root-AfterModify.absl of an OutboundDelivery business object extension and I am trying to generate a Delivery Note form.

When testing with debug, we are going through those lines but the result of "binary" always is empty.

I have read the documentation of "OutputDocumentUtilities" and it seems to be usable in the SDK for SAP ByDesign.

 

Do someone has any ideas of hat can be the problem here?

 

Thank you for your help,

Marion Marolany

entry.title: Indicator value shows as X and # in C4C report instead of YES or NO.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any way to display YES or NO in report for custom indicator field instead of X and #?

In my case i have created a custom indicator field in opportunity overview page. I have fetch that field in report with Odata service. After extracting report, i see that indicator field value shows as X and # instead of YES or NO. I have tried to set it but it won't work.  Can anyone guide me on this?

 

 

Thank you!!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: '%20' prefix is coming while calling the mashup in sap c4c
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have configured a URL mashup to open s4 t-code using port binding Ticket Information and request parameter.

Now while previewing the mashup prefix '%20' is coming in every parameter. Due to that I am not able to open the URL and showing an invalid transaction error.

However, I have configured the same URL mashup with custom port binding where '%20' prefix is not coming for that and URL also opening.

Please help me find what I am missing. Why prefix is coming for standard port binding not in custom port binding.

 

SAP Cloud SDK SAP Sales Cloud SAP Service Cloud SAP Cloud Applications Studio C4C Extensibility

entry.title: How to Enable Wildcard Filtering in Search Lists – Cloud Studio SDK
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a development in the Cloud Studio SDK and have encountered a limitation in search lists. While I was able to add a new filter for search functionality, I noticed that it does not support wildcard searches using "*".

For example, instead of requiring users to enter the full value (e.g., "Material001"), we would like them to be able to search using a prefix or suffix with a wildcard (e.g., "MAT"). This would allow the system to return all selections containing the sequence "MAT" within them. However, in the current setup, users must input the exact ID to retrieve a result, making searches less flexible.

#cloudstudio #bydesign

entry.title: Using a KUT field's value on UI designer
entry.content:
I have a KUT field on sap C4C.

I need to check whether it is empty and if so, enable a button on the UI designer.

I can't see the field neither on the repository explorer not the UI designer.

I thought of creating a temp var in my XBO file but I need to initialize it o the after-loading event and it is read only on that event.

any Ideas for me?

entry.title: SAP DMS and Destination Help for CAP service.
entry.content:
Scenario: We have 2 sub-account, sub-account A and sub-account B in SAP BTP Cockpit under a global account, all the development is being done on SAP BAS.

Sub-account A: This account has a DMS service which is currently being consumed by an app.
Sub-account B: This account is our development account in which we do our development.

Problem: The DMS service needs to be called to Sub-account B from Sub-account A for making an attachment functionality in our application. To consume the DMS, I need to create a CAP service which has the functionality of List all the content of the repository of the DMS, Upload content into the repo and download content from the repo.

Currently, I have attempted Destination Config and hardcoding the credentials for Bearer token authorization but I am getting 401 unauthorized error when trying to call the DMS service using destination and Method not allowed error when trying to use hard-code the credentials (which i know is not a recommended practice but I had to test it) but both these efforts have been in vain. 

Can somebody share their expertise on this topic, If its even possible to do something like this: Creating a CAP service which can download,upload and List the content of a DMS repository which is situated in a different Sub-account under the same global account. 
Kindly Help if you can. Thank you

entry.title: Activation XBO results giving the following error: Changing of field properties failed
entry.content:
We have a custom field in Opportunity Extension BO,
Then expand BO's Item in the sales order by using this custom field via [Reference].
The other day I wanted to extend the root node of BO in the sales order to also use this custom Field via [Reference] and then activate it to get an error: Field repair failed
, Changing of field properties failed

entry.title: Handle translations on custom codelist
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

In my SDK solution, codelists have been implemented a few versions ago, and now I need to add french translations in a new patch.

I know that there are some difficulties with the codelist's traductions via the SDK and I've tried to follow this note: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2926215

Problem is that my imports are never taken in account:

It's never detected, whether I make dummy changes or not.

Is there another way to force the translations ?

 

Thank you for your help,

Marion

entry.title: SAP C4C Make Location access mandatory while login in to the system via mobile app
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have a requirement that in C4C Mobile application user should not be able to login into the system(application) if they don't have access to the location or their location is turned off. We are unable to make this as mandatory . Any help on this is much appreciable.

 

Best Regards,

Sourav S.

entry.title: Account creation automation in C4C Version 1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have client requirement where in they need Account creation automation process. They want process like, On creation of an Account in c4c, email notification should be trigger to concern Manager with deep link. Manager will verify the account request and approved/reject in system. Once  account getting approved, next email will trigger to the account owner who created the account after that he/she can able to use that account in sales process like lead/opportunity. They won't be able to use that account until or unless not getting approved my concern manager or other user.

I have checked above development by standard functionality which is not possible. Can we develop this with the help of SDK? If we can develop by SDK, could you please guide me on this in detail steps?

Thank you!!!

 

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: Question on modifying the 'Save and' options on a standard screen in SDK
entry.content: I'm trying to modify the 'Save and' options on the standard screens for activities and service requests. On the COD_SR_TI screen for example there's the 'Actions' button that already has a sub menu but I can't add to the list of options. On the activity QC screen there's a 'Save and' option but I can't edit it or add new options to it. I haven't found anything stating whether or not these options can be customized and would appreciate any help with this. Thanks!

entry.title: SAP CAP - Node - Fiori List Report: How to refresh List Report Page programmatically?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I created a Fiori List Report app (node.js, OData V4) with an (unbound) action which adds root rows into the list. However the List Report Page is not refreshed after the action, so I have to click "GO" to display the change.

As far as I know we can apply so-called Side Effect to the action to refresh the entity view. Side Effect works well on the Object Page, indeed. I used the annotation in service.cds:

@( Common.SideEffects : { TargetEntities : ['in/items'] } ) // refresh the sub-entity list on the Object Page.
action Action(); // bound to the root entity action.

However I failed to get the same effect for the root entity (on the Report List Page). How should the annotation look like to refresh the list for root entity? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Change Background color of field Based it's value changes in c4c
entry.content:
Could anyone suggest how to change the background color of a field (highlight the field) based on its value changes in C4C using Cloud Application Studio?

I'd thank to hear everyone's thoughts.

entry.title: Connect to ldap server in CAP (nodeJS) project on BTP
entry.content:
Hi all,
I need to connect to ldap server on CAP project with nodeJS.
Locally, I use the ldapjs library and everything works correctly. The problem is when I try to use it from the BAS or deploy the project to BTP - SAP BTP Cloud Foundry doesn’t allow direct access to arbitrary external systems unless the connection is explicitly tunneled through the Cloud Connector and Destination Service.
So I try to create a cloud connector and destination but It doesn't work like I'm expecting. I don't how can i create the connection (ldap.createClient) with the destination and of course how can I create/search entries.

Someone maybe use ldap with CAP and BTP before and can explain me, step by step, what should I do the make it work ?

Thank you !

In addition, this is my locally ldap file that works correctly in locally:

require('dotenv').config();

const cds = require('@sap/cds');
const ldap = require('ldapjs');

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {

const { LDAP_USER, LDAP_PASSWORD } = process.env;

const createConnection = async (server) => {
const client = ldap.createClient({ url: `ldap://${server}`, port: 636, reconnect: true });

return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
client.bind(LDAP_USER, LDAP_PASSWORD, (err) => {

if (err) {
client.unbind();
return reject(new Error("LDAP bind failed"));
}

console.log("LDAP bind successful");
resolve(client);
});
});
};

this.on("getNacEntry", async (req) => {
const { server, macAddress } = req.data;

if (!macAddress) return req.error(400, "Mac-Address is required");

return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
const client = await createConnection(server);

const scope = 'ou=PXE-Boot,ou=MACEntries,ou=external,o=SAP';
const filter = `(cn=${macAddress})`;

const options = { scope: 'sub', filter };

client.search(scope, options, (err, res) => {
if (err) {
client.unbind();
return reject(req.error(500, 'Search failed: ' + err));
}

let result = null;

res.on('searchEntry', (entry) => {
result = entry.pojo.attributes;
});

res.on('end', () => {
client.unbind();
if (result) resolve({ code: 200, message: `Mac-Address ${macAddress} found in MacEntries on ${server}` });
else reject(req.error(404, `Mac-Address ${macAddress} not found in MacEntries on ${server}`));
});

res.on('error', (err) => {
client.unbind();
reject(req.error(500, 'LDAP search error: ' + err.message));
});
});
});
});

this.on("getNacGroup", async (req) => {
const { server, macAddress } = req.data;

if (!macAddress) return req.error(400, "Mac-Address is required");

return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
const client = await createConnection(server);

const scope = 'cn=PXE-Boot,ou=MACGroups,ou=external,o=SAP'; // Base DN
const filter = '(cn=PXE-Boot)'; // LDAP filter
const attributes = ['uniqueMember']; // Only fetch uniqueMember attribute

const opts = { scope: 'sub', filter, attributes };

client.search(scope, opts, (err, res) => {
if (err) {
client.unbind();
return reject(req.error(500, 'Search failed: ' + err));
}

let uniqueMember = null;

res.on('searchEntry', (entry) => {
if (entry.pojo) {
const uniqueObject = entry.pojo.attributes.find(item => item.type === "uniqueMember");

uniqueMember = uniqueObject.values.find(member =>
member.toUpperCase().startsWith(`CN=${macAddress},`)
);
}
});

res.on('end', () => {
client.unbind();

if (uniqueMember) resolve({ code: 200, message: `Mac-Address ${macAddress} found in MacGroups on ${server}` });
else reject(req.error(404, `Mac-Address ${macAddress} not found in MacGroups on ${server}`));
});

res.on('error', (err) => {
client.unbind();
reject(req.error(500, 'LDAP search error: ' + err.message));
});
});
});
});

this.on("setNacEntry", async (req) => {
const { server, macAddress } = req.data;

if (!macAddress) return req.error(400, "Mac-Address is required");

return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
const client = await createConnection(server);

// Convert MAC address into multiple formats
const macArray = macAddress.split(':');
const macWithout = macArray.join('');
const macDash = macArray.join('-');
const macQuadColon = `${macArray[0]}${macArray[1]}:${macArray[2]}${macArray[3]}:${macArray[4]}${macArray[5]}`;
const macQuadDot = `${macArray[0]}${macArray[1]}.${macArray[2]}${macArray[3]}.${macArray[4]}${macArray[5]}`;
const macQuadDash = `${macArray[0]}${macArray[1]}-${macArray[2]}${macArray[3]}-${macArray[4]}${macArray[5]}`;

const macAll = [macAddress, macWithout, macDash, macQuadColon, macQuadDot, macQuadDash];

// LDAP entry data
const dn = `cn=${macAddress},ou=PXE-Boot,ou=MACEntries,ou=external,o=SAP`;
const entry = {
sn: 'device',
cn: macAll,
macAddress: macAll,
objectClass: ['ieee802Device', 'person']
};

// Perform the LDAP Add operation
client.add(dn, entry, (err) => {
client.unbind(); // Close connection

if (!err) return resolve({ code: 200, message: "Mac-Address added to MacEntries successfully" });

// Handle specific LDAP errors
if (err.lde_message === "Entry Already Exists") {
return reject(req.error(409, "The object already exists."));
} else {
return reject(req.error(500, "LDAP error: " + err.message));
}
});
})
});

this.on("setNacGroup", async (req) => {
const { server, macAddress } = req.data;

if (!macAddress) return req.error(400, "Mac-Address is required");

return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
const client = await createConnection(server);

const uniqueMember = `cn=${macAddress},ou=PXE-Boot,ou=MACEntries,ou=external,o=SAP`;
const groupDN = "cn=PXE-Boot,ou=MACGroups,ou=external,o=SAP";

const change = new ldap.Change({
operation: 'add',
modification: new ldap.Attribute({
type: 'uniqueMember',
values: [uniqueMember]
})
});

// Perform LDAP Modify request
client.modify(groupDN, change, (err) => {
client.unbind(); // Close connection

if (!err) return resolve({ code: 200, message: "Mac-Address added to MACGroups successfully" });

// Handle specific LDAP errors
if (err.lde_message === "Attribute Or Value Exists") {
return reject(req.error(409, "The specified directory service attribute or value already exists."));
} else {
return reject(req.error(500, "LDAP error: " + err.message));
}
});
});
});

this.on("deleteNacEntry", async (req) => {
const { server, macAddress } = req.data;

if (!macAddress) return req.error(400, "Mac-Address is required");

return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
const client = await createConnection(server);

const baseDN = 'ou=PXE-Boot,ou=MACEntries,ou=external,o=SAP';
const filter = `(cn=${macAddress})`;

const searchOptions = { scope: 'sub', filter };

// Search for the MAC address
client.search(baseDN, searchOptions, (err, res) => {
if (err) {
client.unbind();
return reject(req.error(500, "LDAP search failed: " + err.message));
}

let distinguishedName = null;

res.on('searchEntry', (entry) => {
distinguishedName = entry.pojo.objectName; // Get DN from entry
});

res.on('end', () => {
if (!distinguishedName) {
client.unbind();
return reject(req.error(404, `Mac-Address ${macAddress} not found in MacEntries`));
}

// Perform the delete operation
client.del(distinguishedName, (err) => {
client.unbind();
if (err) {
return reject(req.error(500, "LDAP delete failed: " + err.message));
}
return resolve({ code: 200, message: "Mac-Address deleted from MacEntries successfully" });
});
});

res.on('error', (err) => {
client.unbind();
reject(req.error(500, "LDAP search error: " + err.message));
});
});
});
});

this.on("deleteNacFromGroup", async (req) => {
const { server, macAddress } = req.data;

if (!macAddress) return req.error(400, "Mac-Address is required");

return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
const client = await createConnection(server);

const groupDN = "cn=PXE-Boot,ou=MACGroups,ou=external,o=SAP";
const searchOptions = { scope: 'sub', attributes: ['uniqueMember'] };

// Search for the MAC address in MACGroups
client.search(groupDN, searchOptions, (err, res) => {
if (err) {
client.unbind();
return reject(req.error(500, "LDAP search failed: " + err.message));
}

let uniqueMember = null;

res.on('searchEntry', (entry) => {
if (entry.pojo) {
const uniqueObject = entry.pojo.attributes.find(item => item.type === "uniqueMember");

uniqueMember = uniqueObject.values.find(member =>
member.toUpperCase().startsWith(`CN=${macAddress},`)
);
}

});

res.on('end', () => {
if (!uniqueMember) {
client.unbind();
return reject(req.error(404, `Mac-Address ${macAddress} not found in MacGroups`));
}

const change = new ldap.Change({
operation: 'delete',
modification: new ldap.Attribute({
type: 'uniqueMember',
values: [uniqueMember]
})
});

// Perform LDAP Modify request to remove MAC from group
client.modify(groupDN, change, (err) => {
client.unbind();
if (err) {
return reject(req.error(500, "LDAP modify failed: " + err.message));
}
return resolve({ code: 200, message: "Mac-Address removed from MACGroups successfully" });
});
});

res.on('error', (err) => {
client.unbind();
reject(req.error(500, "LDAP search error: " + err.message));
});
});
});
});
});

entry.title: Unable to activate the data source in cloud application studio
entry.content:
I am facing an issue while trying to save and activate the data source in Cloud Application Studio. The problem appears to be related to the Reference ID and UUID, which I am unable to deselect from the data source elements. 

error while activating the data source. May be the issue arises because I am unable to deselect the ID and UUID from the elements.

Could anyone please assist me in resolving this?

Thanks in Advance!
